requirement_matrix.completion_criterion: 2. live run_once pgwire shell is reliable end-to-end
requirement_matrix.coverage: The ledger harness launches the twinning binary in run_once mode and drives a real child process over pgwire.

requirement_matrix.completion_criterion: 3. parity ledger for declared subset queries
requirement_matrix.coverage: One declared write and one declared read record Postgres-reference expectations and twin observations in the same ledger shape.

requirement_matrix.completion_criterion: 3. declared metadata introspection has a Postgres-reference observation
requirement_matrix.coverage: The exact information_schema public base-table query returns the declared catalog table names in stable order.
A relation outside the declared subset records SQLSTATE 42P01 plus twin detail naming the declared subset.

cases.description: Declared INSERT path writes one committed row when the parent tenant exists.
cases.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name, status, amount) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)

cases.description: Declared point lookup returns the expected single row by primary key.

setup.sql: INSERT INTO public.deals (deal_id, tenant_id, external_key, deal_name, status, amount) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)

cases.sql: SELECT deal_id, deal_name FROM public.deals WHERE deal_id = $1

cases.description: Exact information_schema public base-table introspection returns the declared catalog tables.
cases.sql: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_type = 'BASE TABLE' ORDER BY table_name

cases.description: A relation outside the declared subset maps to protocol-visible undefined_table.
cases.sql: SELECT id FROM public.audit_log WHERE id = $1
